title: D Block Falls Into Chaos
description: Pages 1–5 focus on d block falls into chaos, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Sanji, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as rebecca struggles through D Block as Cavendish, the crowd, and unseen forces turn the Colosseum match into chaos.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Earlier, that "Black leg" made an appear- once...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It seems that our plans are also running into a number of difficult- ties...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: EVERY- THING YOU'RE DOING...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Is just over some petty, unjustified Grudge!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's no grudge... it's all for the sake of that person's greatest wish...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...what will you do with JORA?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I believe you know just what sort of "family" mine is.

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: That's right, law... if it's for the young master's sake...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'm ready to give my life at any time...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: And the

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: As far as possible, now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That's how far you should run.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...that I've survived,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: to this very day!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I wonder if Tora-Man's really okay!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Can you guys please just keep your eyes open!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Nothing unusual over here, Nami-san!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: That's what I want to hear!! If that guy comes flying at us again...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I'll just blow away all the clouds with a strong wind!! Then he should not be able to follow us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Anyhow, protect Rob- in-chan with your life!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: See ya later.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Franky, USOP, and Robin are all together!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: So if zero's group can just meet up with luffy, we'll be good.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Law's plan was to leave Doflamingo alive and kick that yonkou kaidou's ass!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: As long as he focuses on escaping, then he shouldn't have to die either.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: What's wrong momo?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: You're a dragon again.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: I cannot ...stop shaking.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: That... "Flying Man".....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: I saw him once, when I was at that place before...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Young Master!! He's GoN- NA DIE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: UBU!! gobobo- gobu!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: You guys just don't get it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Just who exactly would get a kick out of seeing you guys run around safe and sound!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: If you can't cut down the enemy, then I at least need to see some of your own blood spilled!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: ABAHH!! AH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: deep down, humans... no matter how good they may seem...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Ahh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: All have within them a certain cruelty that lusts for the sight of blood!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: "Blood" and "Death"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: That's true entertain- ment!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: So get with the program! I

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: gyahh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: You filth!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: I never want to see another sorry match like today's.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: I have a

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: ye...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: YES!! Young Master!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: Kinemon, MOMONO- SURE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: Oh, it's you Kan- Juurou!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: I have found the harbor...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: Let us borrow a boat there. I do not feel good about this country...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: But I think that then Kan- Juurou was captured by that man.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: And I am once again filled with unease...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: Please be safe, Kan- Juurou....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: UOHH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: What sort of face is that!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #53
dialogue.text: Well it depends on why they're after you guys, of course...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #54
dialogue.text: But they do not treat their hostages too roughly.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #55
dialogue.text: So don't worry about it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #56
dialogue.text: Why do you speak in Monoto- Ne...!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #57
dialogue.text: Surely you are thinking about something else right now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #58
dialogue.text: I've... asked an acquain- Lance.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #59
dialogue.text: They can put me under government protection.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #60
dialogue.text: They're coming to meet me at the harbor.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #61
dialogue.text: Really now....!! It's a shame you can't come with us, but as long as you're safe...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #62
dialogue.text: Thanks to you, it seems that at least I can take this first step forward.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #63
dialogue.text: If it's thanks you're giving, how about on my cheek. <3

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #64
dialogue.text: Ahh!! This is bad!! Your ship is under attack by fighting fish!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #65
dialogue.text: You've got to get over there quickly!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #66
dialogue.text: fighting fish!? What're those!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: NNNami-San!! <3

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #67
dialogue.text: I'm on my wayyyy!!!

summary: D Block Falls Into Chaos focuses on Sanji, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as rebecca struggles through D Block as Cavendish, the crowd, and unseen forces turn the Colosseum match into chaos.
